content.en:
The next auctions were almost all competing with the Heavenly Ancestors.

Many of the resource materials were useful to the Heavenly Ancestors, so they were competing frantically, as if the Heavenly Realm Gold Coin was just a number.

Many resources or treasures are on top of tens of millions of Heavenly Realm gold coins, and those invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors are not qualified to compete!

"The next auction is the Red Blood Knife, which is the weapon of the Red Blood Heavenly Ancestor. The Red Blood Heavenly Ancestor has already fallen, so don't worry about the origin of this weapon, there will be no Great Ancestor or forces looking for trouble!"

The weapon of the Red Blood Ancestor!

Many Heavenly Ancestors were moved, because this weapon was really powerful, and it could easily cut through the flesh and blood of Heavenly Ancestors, and if it fell into the hands of ordinary Heavenly Ancestors, it could greatly increase their strength.

And the starting price of this weapon is enough to make many Great Ancestors desperate, and the starting price is 100 million Heavenly Realm gold coins!

The Celestial Ancestors were all rich, so 100 million Heavenly Realm Gold Coins was nothing to them, and they began to bid one after another.

"300 million Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

The True Night Ancestor also participated.

He is also very interested in the Red Blood Knife, and if he wins the auction, it will naturally increase his strength.

However, the True Night Ancestor's financial resources were still inferior to those of the Heavenly Ancestors, and in the end, they were still unable to bid for it, and were auctioned off by another Heavenly Ancestor at a terrifyingly high price of more than 600 million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

Ye Tian looked at a lot of treasures, and he was also interested in his heart.

He does have enough financial resources, but his strength is still too weak now, so if he competes wildly with the Heavenly Ancestors, I am afraid that he will be robbed by the Heavenly Ancestors if he just walks out of Falcon Dragon City!

After all, an invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestor had such terrifying financial resources, which in itself was abnormal.

So, he didn't compete for these treasures.

But the next auction item made him completely moved.

"The next auction is an immeasurable magic technique!"

Qingli Ancestor said.

"An immeasurable supernatural power technique is placed here to cultivate??? what is the Falcon Dragon City auction going on!" said a Heavenly Ancestor dissatisfied.

"Yes, which of the current auction items is not the bidding price of hundreds of millions of Heavenly Realm gold coins, just the immeasurable magic technique, even if it is the top few on the Infinite Divine Power list, it is not worth many Heavenly Realm gold coins!"

"The Infinite Divine Power Technique is just an inheritance, and it is impossible to sell it for too high a price!"

"I guess the auction was missed, now make up for the auction!"

"Will there be such a mistake at the Hayabusa Dragon City Auction House?"

Just when many Great Ancestors and Heavenly Ancestors were discussing, Qingli Great Ancestor explained: "Everyone, this immeasurable magic technique not only contains inheritance, but also contains some materials!"

"What, some of the material? It does deserve to be auctioned now!"

Some Heavenly Ancestors nodded slightly.

If it is an immeasurable supernatural skill on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers, plus some materials, the value is indeed very precious.

At this time, many Great Ancestors were curious about what kind of immeasurable magic power it was.

Even the True Night Ancestor was full of expectations, after all, he could also continue the immeasurable supernatural technique, and if he practiced more immeasurable supernatural skills on the immeasurable supernatural power list, he would also increase some of his strength.

"The next auction of the Infinite Divine Power Technique is the Extreme Skill that ranks first on the Infinite Divine Power List!"

Qingli Ancestor said.

"It's a pole technique!"

Some Great Ancestors frowned slightly, and suddenly lost interest.

And Qingli Great Ancestor continued: "The Extreme Technique requires seventy-two kinds of materials, most of which are relatively ordinary, and only more than twenty kinds of materials are very rare. This time, this inheritance is matched with sixty kinds of materials, except for Tongtian Zhenjin and a few materials, everything else!"

"Hehe, who dares to practice the art of the extreme? And even if there are those who are not afraid of death, it is difficult to get together, and a large amount of pure gold is needed. There are so many Heavenly Pure Gold, all of which can be used to refine the formula resources of the Heavenly Ancestor or exchange for some formula resources, maybe one or two Heavenly Ancestors can be cultivated!"

The True Night Ancestor also frowned slightly, and immediately shook his head, obviously not planning to compete.

Ye Tian also knew this extreme technique, which was ranked among the immeasurable supernatural powers, and its power was really terrifying.

It is rumored that there is a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor who has practiced this extreme technique, and relying on it to kill a Heavenly Ancestor, it is a real kill.

Of course, that was too long ago, and no one knew whether that Great Ancestor was still alive.

However, the fame of the Extreme Point Technique was too loud for any Fifth Stage Great Ancestor to know a little bit about.

It's a pity that if you cultivate the art of the extreme, you will either succeed or die.

There was once a top power that took a long time to gather resources and cultivate an invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestor to cultivate the Extreme Technique, which directly led to its fall, and the resources spent were also wasted!

Since then, there has been no force willing to cultivate the Great Ancestor to cultivate the Extreme Technique.

Soon, the inheritance of the pole technique and some of the materials were presented one by one, and they were all auctioned together.

"The Pole Technique and some materials, the starting price is 100 million Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

Qingli Ancestor announced.

Ye Tian thought that there were not many people bidding, but there were still many bidders, maybe there was a trust, but there was definitely a great ancestor among them who was really bidding.

"Maybe it's not the extreme technique that they are interested in, but those materials, so they should be bidding for those materials!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he also participated in the auction.

After a while, the auction price rose to 300 million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

At this time, only a few Heavenly Ancestors were still bidding for Ye Tian.

Ye Tian obviously felt that a lot of Heavenly Ancestor's eyes were on him, after all, he was only an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor who was willing to spend so many Heavenly Realm gold coins to bid for the Pole Technique, how could it look a little abnormal.

However, the Pole Technique was worth Ye Tian's risk.

"Forget it, it's just the pole technique and some materials, I don't compete!"

One Heavenly Ancestor gave up.

Soon after, several other Heavenly Ancestors also gave up.

Ye Tian finally bid for the extreme technique and these materials at a high price of 360 million.

In the subsequent auction, Ye Tian did not participate.

For him, the auction was almost over.

Of course, he is still sitting here, looking at those Heavenly Ancestor auctions, which can be regarded as rising knowledge.

Suddenly.

A familiar auction item was presented.

"Xuantian Platinum!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

And those Heavenly Ancestors were so excited that their breath couldn't be stabilized.

Obviously, Xuantian Platinum meant too much to him, and every Heavenly Ancestor wanted to obtain Xuantian Platinum.
